Operation 'extractMetadata' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Original summary is generic and doesn't convey the full scope of capabilities. Description mentions screenshots and PDFs but lacks clarity on how to invoke these features, what parameters control them, and what the actual response structure contains. data.current_description: Fetches a URL and returns structured metadata including title, description, image, author, publisher, date, language, and logo. Can also take screenshots and generate PDFs.
data.summary_suggestion: Extract structured metadata and media from URL
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive structured metadata from any URL including title, description, images, author, publisher, date, and language. Supports optional screenshot capture and PDF generation. Accepts URL as primary input parameter. Returns MetadataResponse object containing extracted metadata fields and optional media files. No authentication required for basic usage; API key enables pro features and higher rate limits.
